key.name: format-string
key.description: strftime format string for the top bar clock. Uses your system locale and timezone.

key.name: update-interval
key.description: How often to refresh the label.

key.name: only-topbar
key.description: If true, only modify the GNOME top bar DateMenu label, leaving other panels/taskbars untouched.

key.name: smooth-second
key.description: Align the first update to the next second boundary when the interval is 1s.

key.name: show-panel-icon
key.description: Display a clock icon in the top bar for quick preferences, presets, and copy-time access.

key.name: clock-secondary-opens-menu
key.description: Right-click or middle-click the formatted top-bar clock to open the Numeric Clock quick menu. Left-click still opens the GNOME calendar.
